allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'email' in k.lower\(\) or 'react-email' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('@react-email/components'\); const keys = Object.keys\(c\).filter\(k => k[0] === k[0].toUpperCase\(\) && k[0] !== k[0].toLowerCase\(\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const r = require\('@react-email/render'\); const fn = r.render; console.log\(fn.constructor.name, fn.toString\(\).slice\(0,200\)\);")
